Home / Service Areas / Redmond

Handyman service in Redmond, WA

Trusted local professionals serving Redmond and surrounding communities

Serving Redmond, WA

Northwest Pride Handyman Services provides comprehensive handyman services to the Redmond, WA community. With a significant portion of the population connected to the Microsoft campus, we understand the busy lifestyles of Redmond residents and offer flexible scheduling and efficient service to minimize disruption to your daily routine. Redmond's climate, with its mild and wet winters, can lead to common household issues. We specialize in addressing these issues, from repairing leaky faucets to tackling weather-related damage. Our goal is to provide reliable and affordable handyman services to keep your Redmond home comfortable and well-maintained.

Redmond is home to the Microsoft campus and experiences mild, wet winters with persistent rain, impacting homes in the area.

Handyman service Services in Redmond

Drywall Repair

Expert drywall repair services to restore your walls to their original condition.

Learn more →

Roof & Gutter Cleaning

Protect your Seattle home with professional roof and gutter cleaning services.

Learn more →

Deck Repair & Staining

Revitalize your outdoor living space with expert deck repair and staining.

Learn more →

Fence Repair & Installation

Secure your property with expert fence repair and installation services.

Learn more →

Minor Plumbing Repairs

Reliable solutions for leaky faucets, running toilets, and other minor plumbing issues.

Learn more →

Interior Painting

Transform your home with professional interior painting services.

Learn more →

Furniture Assembly

Hassle-free furniture assembly services for your home or office.

Learn more →
